runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - v8.11.185 Landing AI Text and Dashboard Status
coveredSurfaces: GitLab tag pipeline v8.11.185 completed successfully after retrying one transient Vercel API deploy upload failure
Production /api/version returned version 8.11.185, release tag v8.11.185, commit 5dc589362a921687b1f51bdd0c8f30ea3a6bb564, and pipeline 2540065960
Landing page rendered on Vercel production and the hero OpenManager AI title was visible
Landing hero AI span used landing-title-ai with filter none, transform none, opacity 1, text-rendering geometricprecision, and antialiased font smoothing
Dashboard opened from the landing CTA using the guest session route
Dashboard summary displayed total 18, online 17, warning 1, risk 0, offline 0
Dashboard system resources displayed CPU 31%, Memory 44%, Disk 37%
Dashboard server list displayed '상위 알림 서버 8개 표시 (전체 18대)' with no 0 remaining pagination artifact
Dashboard warning label used '경고' on lb-haproxy-dc1-01 with CPU 62.0%, MEM 36.0%, Disk 24.0%
/api/servers-unified?limit=18 returned 18 servers with online 17, warning 1 and averages CPU 31, Memory 44, Disk 37
Resource warning top list remained aligned with full-source data, including db-mysql-dc1-backup DISK 72 and db-mysql-dc1-primary DISK 66
Vercel usage check passed with effective 13.3467 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 11571
skippedSurfaces: AI Assistant conversational QA was intentionally skipped because this release changed landing/dashboard display state only, not AI prompt routing, stream contracts, model behavior, provider selection, or Vision routing
Mobile viewport, modal-detail pack, auth provider callback, Reporter/Analyst advanced surfaces, and Vision image upload UI were not included in this targeted verification
Cloud Run admin monitoring endpoints were not called directly; GitLab AI Engine deploy and post-deploy smoke were used as deployment evidence

expertAssessments.rationale: Landing AI title production styling was checked with both screenshot and computed style; no CSS blur/filter was present.
Dashboard totals, status counts, and system resource averages were compared against /api/servers-unified?limit=18 and matched the full 18-server source.
GitLab tag pipeline, frontend deploy smoke, AI Engine deploy smoke, and post-deploy version smoke all passed for v8.11.185.
Risk-based Playwright MCP verification covered the changed landing and dashboard surfaces and recorded durable evidence under reports/qa/evidence.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after v8.11.185 production QA; effective 13.3467 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 11571.

artifacts.label: v8.11.185 landing and dashboard state evidence

completedImprovements.title: Landing hero AI text no longer uses blur-like filter/shadow intensity
completedImprovements.evidence: Production computed style: filter none, transform none, opacity 1, text-rendering geometricprecision; screenshot captured.

completedImprovements.title: Dashboard server status and resource overview use the full 18-server source
completedImprovements.evidence: Dashboard totals and averages matched /api/servers-unified?limit=18 values: 18 total, 17 online, 1 warning, CPU 31, Memory 44, Disk 37.

notes: Vercel deploy initially failed on a transient API upload response: invalid JSON from api.vercel.com/v2/files with Internal Server Error body. The failed deploy job was retried and then passed.
The dashboard API default page still returns 10 servers, but the dashboard display now uses the fetched full 18-server source for summary parity.
AI Assistant QA debt from QA-20260520-0544 remains separate and was not retested in this non-AI UI/state release.
